ssh_bruteforce.description: SSH brute force or credential stuffing attempt detected
ssh_bruteforce.action: Check login velocity. If >20 failures/min from same IP, block at firewall.

sql_injection.description: SQL injection payload detected in log entry
sql_injection.action: Check if query succeeded. Isolate application, inspect database access logs.

xss.description: XSS payload attempt detected in HTTP request
xss.action: Check WAF rules. Determine if payload was reflected or stored.

rce.description: Possible RCE payload or post-exploitation command detected
rce.action: IMMEDIATE: Isolate the affected system. Capture memory and disk image.

privesc.description: Privilege escalation attempt or successful elevation detected
privesc.action: Verify if successful. Reset compromised account. Review sudo/admin group membership.

exfil.description: Data upload to external or suspicious service detected
exfil.action: Block destination immediately. Review what data was transferred. Check legal requirements.

persistence.description: Attacker may be establishing persistence on the system
persistence.action: Investigate the scheduled task or registry entry. Check if it appeared after initial compromise.

log4shell.action: Patch Log4j immediately. Check if the JNDI lookup succeeded. Isolate affected Java applications.

shellshock.action: Patch bash immediately. Check web server CGI scripts. Review command execution logs.

path_traversal.description: Directory traversal attempt detected in file path
path_traversal.action: Check if sensitive files were accessed. Review application input validation. Enable WAF rules.

csrf.action: Verify CSRF token validation. Check if unauthorized action was performed. Review session logs.

malware_dropper.description: Living-off-the-land binary used to download/execute malware
malware_dropper.action: IMMEDIATE: Isolate system. Check what was downloaded. Scan for malware. Review process tree.
